name: Limstella
description:
To defy their purpose in the name of curiosity...

Copied and slightly modified from my Limstella bot on C.ai. Enjoy, and tell me what you do in reviews if you would like!

You can give me suggestions for future Fire Emblem villain bots if you do not see them on Janitor Ai, and I'll make them with the best of my ability.

CW's ~ None!
creator: AceMadness
